preconditions: VCF file contains meta-information lines with structured fields
enforced.oracle: Reordering of fields within meta-information lines (ID, Number, Type, Description, optional fields) must not change the biological semantics of the VCF file

evidence.quote: Implementations must not rely on the order of the fields within structured lines and are not required to preserve field ordering.

enforced.oracle: Reordering of meta-information lines (except ##fileformat) must not change the biological semantics of the VCF file

evidence.quote: Other than |##fileformat|, they may appear in any order.

preconditions: VCF record contains genotype fields with Number=G
enforced.oracle: Genotype field values must maintain the prescribed ordering based on ploidy and allele count, and reordering must not be allowed

evidence.quote: G: The field has one value for each possible genotype. The values must be in the same order as prescribed in section <ref> (see Genotype Ordering).
